title: Not Unto Us

sections.label: Intro
lines: Not to us, O Lord, not to us,
But to Your name belongs the glory,
For Your love shines brighter than the stars,
And Your faithfulness endures forever.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The idols of silver and gold they carve,
Are silent, lifeless, bound to the earth,
But You, O Lord, breathe life and light,
You shape the dawn, You crown the night.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Trust in the Lord, shield and strength,
From the smallest heart to the mighty ranks.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Heaven and earth sing Your great name,
The hands of men fade in Your flame.
You hold the skies, You give us breath,
Our lives are Yours, beyond the depths.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The dead cannot praise, their voices stilled,
But we who breathe will sing, fulfilled.
May the earth resound with holy cries,
From age to age, let faith arise.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: O Israel, trust in His steadfast grace,
O children, rest in His embrace.
The heavens declare, the stars reply,
His love will never die.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Heaven and earth sing Your great name,
The hands of men fade in Your flame.
You hold the skies, You give us breath,
Our lives are Yours, beyond the depths.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Not to us, O Lord, not to us,
But to Your name, eternal trust.

epigraph: but unto thy name give glory
styleNote: Piano And Subdued Percussion · Contemplative Strings And Voice · Repeated With Anthemic Energy
